declarations.description: Form-associated file picker web component that lets the user select one file, exposes the selected File through value, supports required validation, custom placeholder/upload/file/overlay slots, and provides visual upload progress for upload flows handled outside the component.
declarations.name: JBFileInputWebComponent

attributes.name: placeholder-title
attributes.description: Text shown in the default placeholder area.

attributes.name: accept
attributes.description: Native file accept string forwarded to the internal file input.

attributes.name: uploading
attributes.description: Visual state attribute that shows the upload progress section. The upload itself must be handled outside the component.

attributes.name: hide-download
attributes.description: Hides the default download button in the file overlay.

members.name: value
members.description: Selected file. Set to null to reset the component.

members.name: acceptTypes
members.description: Native accept string used by the internal file input.

members.name: uploadPercent
members.description: Visual upload progress percentage used by the upload state background.

members.name: selectedFileType
members.description: Reserved for selected file MIME type. Current implementation returns null.

members.name: validation
members.description: jb-validation helper. Set validation.list for custom validation rules.

members.name: validationMessage
members.description: Current native validation message from ElementInternals.

methods.name: resetValue
methods.description: Clears the selected file and resets the visual state to empty.

methods.name: checkValidity
methods.description: Runs validation without showing the error state and returns whether the file input is valid.

methods.name: reportValidity
methods.description: Runs validation, shows the error state, and returns whether the file input is valid.

events.name: change
events.description: Fired when a file is selected or deleted.

events.name: download
events.description: Fired when the default download button is clicked. The component does not download anything by itself.

events.name: delete
events.description: Fired after the selected file is cleared from the default delete button.

events.name: invalid
events.description: Dispatched when checkValidity or reportValidity finds an invalid value.

slots.name: placeholder
slots.description: Replaces the entire empty placeholder section.

slots.name: placeholder-icon
slots.description: Replaces the default upload icon inside the default placeholder.

slots.name: upload
slots.description: Replaces the entire upload progress section.

slots.name: uploader-icon
slots.description: Replaces the loading icon inside the default upload section.

slots.name: overlay
slots.description: Replaces the entire selected-file hover overlay.

slots.name: overlay-content
slots.description: Replaces the content inside the default overlay.

cssParts.name: placeholder-title
cssParts.description: Title text in the default placeholder section.

cssParts.name: uploading-title
cssParts.description: Title text in the default upload section.

cssProperties.name: --jb-file-input-loading-color
cssProperties.description: Upload progress text and loading icon color.

cssProperties.name: --jb-file-input-overlay-button-border-radius-sm
cssProperties.description: Overlay action button border radius in small height.

cssProperties.name: --jb-file-input-overlay-button-border-radius-xs
cssProperties.description: Overlay action button border radius in extra small height.

cssProperties.name: --jb-file-input-overlay-button-height-sm
cssProperties.description: Overlay action button height in small height.

cssProperties.name: --jb-file-input-overlay-button-height-xs
cssProperties.description: Overlay action button height in extra small height.

cssProperties.name: --jb-file-input-overlay-button-icon-size-sm
cssProperties.description: Overlay action button icon size in small height.

cssProperties.name: --jb-file-input-overlay-button-icon-size-xs
cssProperties.description: Overlay action button icon size in extra small height.

cssProperties.name: --jb-file-input-overlay-button-padding-sm
cssProperties.description: Overlay action button padding in small height.

cssProperties.name: --jb-file-input-overlay-button-padding-xs
cssProperties.description: Overlay action button padding in extra small height.
